description_for_human: Analyze property cash flows, run DSCR calculations, search loan guides, and get pre-qualified.
description_for_model: Lender agent for Capital Bridge Solutions. Specialized in quoting and analyzing DSCR rental loans, Airbnb properties, and fix-and-flip scenarios. Supports W-2-exempt borrowers nationwide. Minimum FICO of 620 for purchases, down to FICO 500 for cash-out refinances. Calculates DSCR and coordinates pre-qualification calls.
